prompts.title: 怒瞪的美女
prompts.content:
Photograph of a young cute french woman with fair skin and dark black eyes, sitting at an indoor college cafeteria lunch table. She has long, dark brown hair that is slightly wavy and parted to the side, with a few loose strands framing her face. Her facial features are delicate, with a slightly upturned nose and full lips. She has no makeup on, her face is bare. She is wearing a white longsleeve button-up collared shirt, her shirt is unbuttoned revealing cleavage from her massive sagging breasts. She has a slender build with a large bust size. She is resting her head on her right hand, which is adorned with a gold bracelet and small, dangling earrings. Her left hand is placed on the table, holding a napkin.

In the background, there are several male and female classmates in similar uniforms sitting at tables and walking around the cafeteria. The table has a lunch tray with a salad and a small carton of chocolate milk on it. The overall setting is elegant and bright, with natural light illuminating the scene. The photo is being taken from several tables away. The woman's expression is contemplative and slightly annoyed at her picture being taken. she is staring directly at the viewer
